gmv.note: sum of item prices per product (olist_order_items)

rating.note: mean review score of orders containing the product; products with <3 reviews fall back to the seller mean

price_band.note: within-seller terciles of median unit price

views.note: orders / band-level conversion assumption {'low': 0.04, 'mid': 0.03, 'high': 0.02}; Olist has no traffic data, so the conversion signal is coarse

margin_rate_assumption.note: band-level placeholder {'low': 0.16, 'mid': 0.28, 'high': 0.38}; Olist has no cost data

stock_units.note: deterministic hash of product_id scaled to orders x (0.5, 8.0); Olist has no inventory data

decision.note: produced by the repository's Python agents (provider=none), not hand-written

decision.diagnosis: Portfolio diagnosis for Olist 2016-10 ~ 2018-08 (full window): prioritize watches_gifts-2ffd with action IMPROVE. The recommendation ranks measured demand, conversion, quality and stock signals while preserving explicit assumptions.

recommendations.experiment: Review recent complaints; fix the dominant quality issue before adding traffic.
Run a +3% price test against a holdout; measure conversion and contribution margin, not GMV alone.
Hold price and inventory policy; monitor conversion and rating weekly.
Hold price and inventory policy; monitor conversion and rating weekly.
Hold price and inventory policy; monitor conversion and rating weekly.

decision.diagnosis: Insufficient evidence for Olist 2016-10 ~ 2018-08 (full window): 18 orders and 792 views are below the minimum observation thresholds (30 orders, 500 views) [E1][E2]. No SKU ranking is produced because it would present noise as a recommendation. Collect more history or widen the period before acting.
